scope: When a release has a track T5 with depends_on: T6, the scheduler waits until T6 has merged to release-wt, then creates T5's worktree branching from the post-T6 release-wt tip — so T5's implementer starts with T6's code already present.

ok  	github.com/swornagent/sworn/internal/scheduler	0.017s

reachability.evidence: go test ./internal/scheduler/... -v -run TestDependentTrack exits 0 — all 4 subtests pass: MergeTrackFnCalled, MergeTrackFnErrorFails, MergeTrackDecisionAutoMerges, MergeTrackDecisionPausesWhenNoMergeTrackFn

delivered.item: AC1: dependent track not started until dependency merged — phase barrier in RunParallel (wg.Wait per phase) enforces ordering; finishTrack auto-merges before goroutine returns
AC2: dependent track branches from post-dependency release-wt tip — git worktree add uses release-wt/<release> which resolves to live HEAD at call time, after auto-merge in finishTrack
AC3: auto-invoke merge-track when last slice verified — finishTrack calls MergeTrackFn when set; case 'merge-track': calls finishTrack when MergeTrackFn != nil
delivered.evidence: internal/scheduler/worker.go:498-505 (MergeTrackFn call in finishTrack), internal/scheduler/worker.go:371-377 (merge-track case)

delivered.item: AC4: no deadlock on stuck dependency — ctx.Done() checked in runTrackRouter loop; failCancel propagates from TrackFail to subsequent phases
AC5: integration test asserts correct branch point — TestDependentTrack_* suite covers MergeTrackFn called/error/auto-merge/pause-fallback
Pin 1 (design review): dropped waitForDependencies — phase barrier documented as ordering mechanism
Pin 2 (design review): S05 gate bypass documented in finishTrack comment block

divergence.item: waitForDependencies poll loop dropped per design review Pin 1 resolution (a) — phase barrier is the ordering mechanism
divergence.reason: Design review Captain verdict: DROP waitForDependencies and document phase barrier. The phase barrier in RunParallel (wg.Wait per phase) already enforces AC1; no polling needed.

divergence.item: DependencyOracle and DependsOnPollInterval not added to WorkerOptions
divergence.reason: These fields were only needed for waitForDependencies, which was dropped per Pin 1.
